title: QuantumScape Successfully Accomplishes Annual Commercial Engagement Goal
text: QuantumScape announced in December 2025 the achievement of its final annual goal for 2025 by signing a joint development agreement (JDA) with a new Top-10 global automaker. Over the past year, QuantumScape entered into an expanded collaboration and licensing deal with PowerCo (the battery maker of the Volkswagen Group) and established agreements to develop high-volume ceramic separator production with Murata Manufacturing and Corning. Volkswagen's PowerCo agreed to provide up to $131 million in milestone-based payments over the next two years to support the development of the QSE-5 pilot line in San Jose. QuantumScape reported $12.8 million in customer billings in the third quarter from Volkswagen's PowerCo for joint development work. Over the past 12 months, QuantumScape has expanded its collaboration and licensing deal with Volkswagen's PowerCo, signed JDAs with two major global automakers, and initiated a technology evaluation agreement with another large OEM, suggesting that multiple automakers are now at different stages of engagement.
